title: carex aquatilis subsp. altior
intro: Carex aquatilis subsp. altior is a subspecies of the sedge plant, specifically a type of aquatic sedges native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex aquatilis subsp. altior include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
